# sirrlock/scoop-bucket — Sirr Scoop Bucket (Windows)

Scoop bucket for Sirr — the ephemeral secret manager on Windows.

## Install

scoop bucket add sirrlock https://github.com/sirrlock/scoop-bucket
scoop install sirrlock/sirrd   # Server daemon
scoop install sirrlock/sirr    # CLI client

## Packages

sirrd — Sirr server daemon (self-hosted ephemeral secret vault)
sirr  — Sirr CLI client (push, get, and manage secrets)

## Mac / Linux

Use Homebrew: brew tap sirrlock/tap

## Source

github.com/sirrlock/scoop-bucket
